name: An Ethereum-mainnet-only token address scanned on Base
label: not_deployed
reason: Replace with a real L1-only token address from your batch-130 set. It has no code on Base (eth_getCode == 0x), so ANY finding is a chain-misattribution false positive. The chain-attribution gate must suppress all findings here.
